requirement_topic.en: ANRT Mandatory Homologation (Type Approval) — Telecom Law 24-96

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT wireless devices) must obtain ANRT homologation (type approval) before import or sale in Morocco. The legal basis is Moroccan Telecom Law 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications and its amendments. Homologation requires submission of a technical file including test reports from ANRT-approved or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories, device specifications, and details of the Moroccan authorized importer. Upon approval, an ANRT homologation certificate is issued and the ANRT label (or homologation number) must be affixed to the product. CE mark, CCC, and SRRC approval are not recognized as equivalent by ANRT. EN-harmonized test reports from accredited laboratories may be used as the technical basis for the homologation submission.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备）在摩洛哥进口或销售前，须取得ANRT型式核准（homologation）。法律依据为摩洛哥电信法24-96（Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications）及其修正案。型式核准须提交技术文件，包括来自ANRT认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告、设备规格及摩洛哥授权进口商信息。获批后颁发ANRT型式核准证书，产品上须贴附ANRT标签（或型式核准编号）。CE标志、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT认可为等同文件。来自认可实验室的EN协调测试报告可作为型式核准申请的技术基础。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢式及物聯網無線裝置）在摩洛哥進口或銷售前，須取得ANRT型式核准（homologation）。法律依據為摩洛哥電信法24-96（Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications）及其修正案。型式核准須提交技術文件，包括來自ANRT認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告、裝置規格及摩洛哥授權進口商資訊。獲批後頒發ANRT型式核准證書，產品上須貼附ANRT標籤（或型式核准編號）。CE標誌、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT認可為等同文件。來自認可實驗室的EN協調測試報告可作為型式核准申請的技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications (Morocco) and amendments — mandatory homologation for all radio and telecom terminal equipment
ANRT Decision on homologation procedures and technical specifications for terminal equipment
ETSI EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz WLAN / Bluetooth) — commonly referenced technical standard for ANRT submissions
ETSI EN 301 893 (5 GHz WLAN) — commonly referenced; 5 GHz restricted to indoor use in Morocco
ETSI EN 301 511 / EN 301 908 series (GSM / UMTS / LTE cellular) — for cellular-capable devices

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (SRRC licence) for all radio transmitter equipment under MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular devices must obtain SRRC approval before sale. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is additionally required for certain ITE and audio/video products. The MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) is required for telecom terminal devices sold through telecom operators. These Chinese approvals (SRRC, CCC, NAL) are not recognized by ANRT and do not substitute for Moroccan homologation.
summary.zh: 中国依据工信部2016年第14号令，对所有无线电发射设备要求取得MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准（SRRC许可证）。Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝设备在销售前须取得SRRC批准。部分信息技术及音视频产品还须取得CCC（中国强制认证）。通过电信运营商销售的电信终端设备须取得MIIT进网许可（NAL）。上述中国批准（SRRC、CCC、NAL）均不被ANRT认可，不能替代摩洛哥型式核准。
summary.zht: 中國依據工信部2016年第14號令，對所有無線電發射設備要求取得MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准（SRRC許可證）。Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂巢式裝置在銷售前須取得SRRC批准。部分資訊技術及音視頻產品還須取得CCC（中國強制認證）。透過電信運營商銷售的電信終端裝置須取得MIIT進網許可（NAL）。上述中國批准（SRRC、CCC、NAL）均不被ANRT認可，不能替代摩洛哥型式核准。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016 (Administration of Radio Transmitter Equipment Type Approval) — SRRC licence
SRRC type approval — MIIT/SRRC Radio Regulatory Bureau, China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, for applicable ITE and audio/video products
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — for telecom terminal equipment sold via operators
GB/T 22450.1 (2.4 GHz WLAN radio performance, China), YD/T 1312 series (cellular, China)

gap.en: ANRT homologation is a mandatory standalone requirement with no mutual recognition arrangement with China SRRC, CCC, or CE mark. A fresh homologation application must be submitted to ANRT via the online portal, supported by test reports from ANRT-approved or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories referencing the applicable ETSI/EN or IMANOR NM standards. Existing ETSI EN-based CE-mark test reports from accredited laboratories may be used as the technical basis for the ANRT submission, potentially reducing re-testing cost, but must be reviewed against current ANRT procedural requirements. The ANRT homologation certificate and label number must appear on the product. Note: 5 GHz Wi-Fi (ETSI EN 301 893) is restricted to indoor use only in Morocco; devices with active 5 GHz outdoor operation would require specific frequency coordination.
gap.zh: ANRT型式核准是独立强制要求，与中国SRRC、CCC及CE标志之间不存在互认安排。须通过ANRT在线门户提交全新的型式核准申请，并附上来自ANRT认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室、引用适用ETSI/EN或IMANOR NM标准的测试报告。来自认可实验室、基于ETSI EN的现有CE标志测试报告可作为ANRT申请的技术基础，有望降低重新测试成本，但须对照ANRT现行程序要求进行审查。ANRT型式核准证书及标签编号须标注于产品上。注意：5GHz Wi-Fi（ETSI EN 301 893）在摩洛哥限于室内使用；具备5GHz室外有效运行功能的设备须进行专项频率协调。
gap.zht: ANRT型式核准是獨立強制要求，與中國SRRC、CCC及CE標誌之間不存在互認安排。須透過ANRT線上入口提交全新的型式核准申請，並附上來自ANRT認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室、引用適用ETSI/EN或IMANOR NM標準的測試報告。來自認可實驗室、基於ETSI EN的現有CE標誌測試報告可作為ANRT申請的技術基礎，有望降低重新測試成本，但須對照ANRT現行程序要求進行審查。ANRT型式核准證書及標籤編號須標注於產品上。注意：5GHz Wi-Fi（ETSI EN 301 893）在摩洛哥限於室內使用；具備5GHz室外有效運行功能的裝置須進行專項頻率協調。

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANRT homologation is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Morocco. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and CE mark are not recognised as equivalent. A fresh ANRT homologation application with test reports from ANRT-approved or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories referencing ETSI/EN or IMANOR NM standards is required. Existing ETSI-based CE-mark test reports may serve as technical supporting evidence. The ANRT label or homologation number must appear on the product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ANRT型式核准是所有无线电及电信终端设备在摩洛哥进口或销售前的强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC及CE标志均不被认可为等同文件。须向ANRT提交全新的型式核准申请，并附上来自ANRT认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室、引用ETSI/EN或IMANOR NM标准的测试报告。现有基于ETSI的CE标志测试报告可作为技术佐证资料。产品上须标注ANRT标签或型式核准编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ANRT型式核准是所有無線電及電信終端裝置在摩洛哥進口或銷售前的強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC及CE標誌均不被認可為等同文件。須向ANRT提交全新的型式核准申請，並附上來自ANRT認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室、引用ETSI/EN或IMANOR NM標準的測試報告。現有基於ETSI的CE標誌測試報告可作為技術佐證資料。產品上須標注ANRT標籤或型式核准編號。
